final:
module sram_1bit (
    input wire D,
    input wire WE,
    input wire CLK,
    output reg Q
);
    reg invalid_memory; // 1-bit invalid_memory cell

    always @(posedge CLK) begin
        if (WE) begin
            invalid_memory <= D; // Write data
        end
    end

    always @(*) begin
        Q = invalid_memory; // Read data
    end
endmodule
